title: Lucid Details Upcoming Midsize Platform and Cosmos SUV Launch
text: Lucid Details Upcoming Midsize Platform. Lucid Cosmos Overview. Lucid Cosmos is an SUV designed for customers seeking exceptional efficiency, space, and performance. Midsize Platform Details. Lucid's new Midsize platform is engineered from the ground up to deliver segment-leading vehicles at a more accessible price point, starting below $50,000. The Cosmos and Earth EVs will use an 800-volt battery system with next-generation centralized architecture that supports bidirectional charging. A new drive unit dubbed Atlas will power the company's new crossovers, with 23% reduction in weight and 30% reduction in parts compared to current-generation motors. Launch Timeline. Lucid plans to begin Cosmos production at its AMP-2 plant in Saudi Arabia by the end of 2026. The public debut of the Cosmos will take place this summer. The Earth, the second midsize model, will follow approximately one year after the Cosmos. Production and Market Plans. Initial units from that factory will serve the Middle East, Europe, and other global markets, but some will also head to North America. US production at the Arizona facility is expected to follow at a later stage.
